Metadata.title: LumenLingo — Domine Idiomas Através de Experiências Imersivas
Metadata.description: Baixe o LumenLingo, o app premium de aprendizado de idiomas para iPhone. Flashcards elegantes, prática adaptativa, paisagens sonoras ambientais e muito mais. Grátis na App Store.

Hero.headline: Domine Idiomas <gradient>Com Experiências</gradient> Imersivas
Hero.subheadline: Uma jornada visual pelo aprendizado de idiomas. Flashcards elegantes, paisagens sonoras ambientais e exercícios de respiração — projetado para que cada sessão pareça uma meditação.

FeatureShowcase.heading: Tudo Que Você Precisa Para Dominar um Novo Idioma
FeatureShowcase.description: Seis pilares poderosos projetados para transformar a forma como você aprende, pratica e retém novos idiomas.
FeatureShowcase.immersiveFlashcardsDesc: Cartões com design refinado, repetição espaçada, gestos de deslizar e feedback visual que tornam a memorização natural.
FeatureShowcase.smartPracticeDesc: Três modos distintos — múltipla escolha, construtor de palavras e quiz de gramática — que se adaptam ao seu nível e mantêm sua motivação.
FeatureShowcase.richSoundscapesDesc: 12 ambientes sonoros — de chuva tropical ao espaço profundo — que reduzem a ansiedade e aumentam a concentração durante suas sessões.
FeatureShowcase.breathingOrbsDesc: Exercícios de respiração guiados com orbes visuais hipnóticos que acalmam a mente antes ou entre as sessões de prática.
FeatureShowcase.languagePairsDesc: Aprenda em qualquer direção entre 9 idiomas. Estude espanhol a partir do inglês, japonês a partir do alemão, ou qualquer combinação.
FeatureShowcase.progressTrackingDesc: Análises detalhadas, sequências diárias, marcos de XP e indicadores de domínio que mostram exatamente o quanto você avançou.

ScreenshotGallery.heading: Projetado Para Inspirar
ScreenshotGallery.description: Cada tela foi criada com intenção. Deslize e descubra a atenção aos detalhes que torna o LumenLingo único.

Differentiators.heading: Por Que LumenLingo?
Differentiators.description: Mais que um app de idiomas — é uma experiência de aprendizado consciente projetada para ser tão bonita quanto eficaz.
Differentiators.designDesc: Cada pixel é criado com cuidado. Modo escuro primeiro, animações suaves como seda e estética cósmica que tornam o aprendizado premium.
Differentiators.environmentsDesc: 12 paisagens sonoras únicas e fundos animados transformam sua sessão de estudo em um retiro meditativo.
Differentiators.practiceModesDesc: Flashcards, quizzes de gramática e construtor de palavras — cada um com mecânicas únicas, feedback visual e dificuldade adaptativa.
Differentiators.mindfulnessDesc: Orbes de respiração, sons ambientais e visuais relaxantes reduzem a ansiedade e criam o espaço mental perfeito para aprender.

CTA.heading: Comece Sua Jornada Linguística <gradient>Hoje</gradient>
CTA.description: Baixe o LumenLingo grátis na App Store. Planos premium disponíveis para quem quer ir além.

Pricing.heading: Escolha Sua Trilha de Aprendizado
Pricing.description: Comece grátis, faça upgrade quando estiver pronto. Cada nível constrói sobre o anterior, então você nunca perde acesso às funcionalidades essenciais.
Pricing.trialBadge: Experimente o acesso Royal grátis por 14 dias

free.name: Grátis
free.description: Perfeito para começar. Explore os recursos principais e descubra por que os estudantes amam o LumenLingo.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Para estudantes dedicados que querem mais idiomas, prática ilimitada e experiências mais ricas.

elite.name: Elite
elite.description: Desbloqueie a experiência completa do LumenLingo com todos os idiomas, modos avançados e visuais impressionantes.

royal.name: Royal
royal.description: O nível definitivo para mestres de idiomas. Todos os recursos, sem limites, extras exclusivos.

comparison.heading: Comparar Todas as Funcionalidades
comparison.description: Cada nível constrói sobre o anterior. Níveis superiores incluem todas as funcionalidades dos níveis inferiores.

faq.heading: Perguntas Frequentes
faq.description: Tudo que você precisa saber sobre os preços e assinaturas do LumenLingo.

meta.title: Preços
meta.description: Escolha o nível de assinatura LumenLingo perfeito. Comece grátis ou desbloqueie Pro, Elite ou Royal para mais idiomas, paisagens sonoras, fundos visuais e recursos premium.
meta.ogDescription: Compare os níveis Free, Pro, Elite e Royal. Comece grátis, faça upgrade quando estiver pronto.

Features.heading: Feito Para Aprendizes Comprometidos
Features.description: Cada funcionalidade do LumenLingo é projetada com a ciência cognitiva em mente. Da repetição espaçada à imersão ambiental, descubra o que torna o aprendizado conosco diferente.

walkthroughs.heading: Veja em ação
walkthroughs.subheading: Como é a experiência de aprender
walkthroughs.description: Três experiências centrais que definem a jornada LumenLingo.

languagePairs.heading: Pares de Idiomas
languagePairs.description: Aprenda em qualquer direção. Passe o cursor sobre um cartão para ver um exemplo.
languagePairs.comingSoonDesc: Mais idiomas e pares estão a caminho. Junte-se ao acesso antecipado para ser o primeiro a saber.

meta.title: Recursos
meta.description: Explore todos os recursos do LumenLingo: cartões imersivos, repetição espaçada inteligente, 3 modos de prática, 12 paisagens sonoras, esferas de respiração, 25+ pares de idiomas e mais.
meta.ogDescription: Explore todos os recursos do LumenLingo: cartões imersivos, repetição espaçada, 3 modos de prática, 12 paisagens sonoras e mais.

About.heading: Sobre a LumenShore
About.description: A história por trás do app, o que nos motiva e para onde estamos indo.

values.beautyDesc: Acreditamos que ferramentas para a mente devem ser belas. Cada pixel, cada animação, cada interação é projetada para encantar.
values.scienceDesc: Repetição espaçada, recordação ativa e intercalação — fundamentados em décadas de pesquisa em ciência cognitiva.
values.privacyDesc: Seus dados ficam no seu dispositivo e no seu iCloud. Não vendemos dados, não rastreamos comportamento nem exibimos anúncios.
values.accessibleDesc: Suporte completo para VoiceOver, Dynamic Type e Reduzir Movimento. O aprendizado de idiomas deve ser para todos.

timeline.sparkDesc: A LumenShore foi fundada com uma crença simples: apps de aprendizado de idiomas podem ser bonitos, conscientes e eficazes — tudo ao mesmo tempo.
timeline.betaDesc: A primeira versão do LumenLingo foi distribuída aos beta testers. Os flashcards, paisagens sonoras e o ciclo principal de aprendizado ganharam forma.
timeline.launchDesc: O LumenLingo foi lançado mundialmente na App Store com 9 idiomas, 25+ pares e um modelo de assinatura em cinco níveis.
timeline.growingDesc: Novos idiomas, novas funcionalidades e uma comunidade crescente de aprendizes que descobrem uma forma mais bonita de aprender.

Contact.heading: Tem uma pergunta?
Contact.description: Não encontrou o que procura nas perguntas frequentes? Adoraríamos ouvir você.
Contact.faqDescription: Respostas rápidas para as perguntas mais comuns sobre o LumenLingo.

meta.title: Ajuda e Contato
meta.description: Encontre respostas para perguntas frequentes sobre o LumenLingo ou entre em contato com a equipe da LumenShore. Estamos aqui para ajudar na sua jornada de aprendizado de idiomas.
meta.ogDescription: Encontre respostas para perguntas frequentes sobre o LumenLingo ou entre em contato com a equipe da LumenShore.

Download.description: Domine idiomas através de experiências imersivas. Bonito, consciente, eficaz.

benefits.soundscapesDesc: 12 paisagens sonoras selecionadas — de chuva suave a nébula cósmica — para sessões de estudo focado.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Read how LumenShore handles your data with care across the LumenLingo iOS app and lumenlingo.com website. Privacy-first approach, on-device processing, GDPR, CCPA and your rights.

hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters deeply to us. Here’s exactly how we handle your data across the LumenLingo app and website — in plain English, not legal jargon.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.p1: LumenShore Ltd (“LumenShore”, “we”, “us”, or “our”), company number 09607326, registered at Windsor House, Troon Way Business Centre, Humberstone Lane, Leicester, England, LE4 9HA, operates the LumenLingo mobile application (the “App”) and the lumenlingo.com website (the “Website”). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you use either platform.
overview.p2: We built LumenLingo with a privacy-first architecture. On the iOS app, your learning data is processed and stored on your device and in your personal iCloud account — not on our servers. On the website, we collect minimal data necessary to operate the service and improve your experience. We believe your data is yours, and it should stay that way.
overview.p3: This policy is organised into two sections — Website and iOS App — so you can quickly find the information relevant to you.

websiteData.heading: Website Data Collection
websiteData.intro: When you visit lumenlingo.com, we may collect the following data:
websiteData.li1: Email address — if you sign up for our newsletter or join the waitlist. We collect your email solely to send you product updates and launch notifications. You can unsubscribe at any time.
websiteData.li2: Language preference — if you join the waitlist, we record which language you’re interested in to tailor future communications.
websiteData.li3: Campaign attribution (UTM parameters) — we capture UTM parameters (source, medium, campaign) from URLs in your browser’s sessionStorage to understand which marketing channels are effective. This data is not tied to your identity and is cleared when you close your browser tab.
websiteData.li4: Anonymous page views — we use Vercel Analytics, a cookie-free, privacy-respecting analytics service, to count page visits. No personal data is collected, no cookies are set, and no individual users are identified.
websiteData.li5: Anonymous performance metrics — we use Vercel Speed Insights to measure page load times and core web vitals. This data is fully anonymous and helps us keep the website fast.
websiteData.li6: Error data and session replays — we use Sentry for error monitoring. With your consent, Sentry may record session replays to help us diagnose and fix bugs. See the ‘Sentry Session Replay’ section below for full details.
websiteData.li7: IP addresses — your IP address is processed transiently by our API routes for rate limiting (to prevent abuse). IP addresses are not stored or logged by us.

sentryReplay.heading: Sentry Session Replay
sentryReplay.p1: We use Sentry (operated by Functional Software, Inc.) for error monitoring on our website. Sentry’s session replay feature records page interactions (clicks, scrolls, navigation) to help us reproduce and fix bugs.
sentryReplay.p2: Sampling rates: Session replays are captured for approximately 0.1% of normal browsing sessions. When an error occurs, the replay capture rate increases to 100% for that session only — this helps us understand exactly what led to the bug.
sentryReplay.p3: What is captured: Page navigation, clicks, scrolls, and screen content. All text inputs in forms (such as newsletter and waitlist fields) are masked to protect your privacy. Media content is blocked from capture.
sentryReplay.p4: What is sent: Replay data is transmitted to Sentry’s servers in the United States. It is retained according to Sentry’s data retention policy (typically 90 days).
sentryReplay.p5: Your control: Session replays are only active if you have given consent via our cookie consent banner. You can change your preference at any time.

vercelAnalytics.heading: Vercel Analytics & Speed Insights
vercelAnalytics.p1: We use Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights on our website. These services are privacy-focused by design:
vercelAnalytics.li1: No cookies — Vercel Analytics does not set any cookies on your device.
vercelAnalytics.li2: No personal data — no IP addresses, device fingerprints, or user identifiers are collected.
vercelAnalytics.li3: Aggregate only — we see total page view counts and performance metrics, but we cannot identify individual visitors.
vercelAnalytics.p2: Both services are operated by Vercel Inc. Data is processed on Vercel’s infrastructure. See <vercelPrivacy>Vercel’s Privacy Policy</vercelPrivacy> for more details.

customEvents.heading: Custom Analytics Events
customEvents.intro: In addition to page views, we track the following anonymised events through Vercel Analytics to understand how visitors use our website. No personal data is attached to these events:
customEvents.li1: app_store_click — when a visitor clicks an App Store download link (records link location on the page)
customEvents.li2: pricing_view — when a visitor views the pricing page
customEvents.li3: pricing_cta_click — when a visitor clicks a pricing call-to-action button (records which tier)
customEvents.li4: blog_post_read — when a visitor reads most of a blog post (records the post slug and title)
customEvents.li5: feature_section_view — when a visitor views a feature section on the homepage
customEvents.li6: newsletter_signup — when a visitor signs up for the newsletter (records the page location, not the email)
customEvents.li7: demo_started — when a visitor starts the interactive flashcard demo
customEvents.li8: demo_completed — when a visitor completes the demo (records correct/total scores)
customEvents.li9: demo_cta_click — when a visitor clicks a call-to-action after completing the demo
customEvents.li10: page_not_found — when a visitor lands on a 404 page (records the path)
customEvents.li11: error_page_view — when a visitor sees an error page (records the error message)

serviceWorker.heading: Offline Caching (Service Worker)
serviceWorker.p1: Our website uses a Service Worker to cache static assets (HTML pages, CSS stylesheets, JavaScript bundles, images, and fonts) on your device. This enables faster page loads on repeat visits and limited offline access.
serviceWorker.p2: The Service Worker cache is stored entirely on your device and contains no personal data. You can clear it at any time through your browser’s settings (Clear site data). No cached data is sent back to our servers.

appData.heading: iOS App Data Collection
appData.intro: The LumenLingo iOS app collects minimal data necessary to provide a great learning experience:
appData.li1: Learning progress data — flashcard mastery levels, practice scores, streaks, XP, and session history. This data is stored locally on your device and synced via iCloud.
appData.li2: App preferences — your selected language pairs, soundscape preferences, visual background choices, and tier selection. Stored on-device and synced via iCloud.
appData.li3: Subscription status — your membership tier, managed entirely by Apple through the App Store. We receive a subscription status from Apple but do not process payment information.
appData.li4: Anonymous analytics — we may collect aggregated, non-identifiable usage metrics (such as which features are most popular) to improve the app. No personal data is included.

whatWeDontCollect.heading: What We Don’t Collect
whatWeDontCollect.intro: Across both our app and website, we want to be clear about what we never collect or do:
whatWeDontCollect.li1: No location data or GPS coordinates
whatWeDontCollect.li2: No contacts, photos, or access to other apps on your device
whatWeDontCollect.li3: No payment or credit card information (Apple handles all app billing)
whatWeDontCollect.li4: No advertising identifiers or tracking pixels
whatWeDontCollect.li5: No data sold or shared with third-party advertisers — ever
whatWeDontCollect.li6: No personal data shared with AI model training services

legalBasis.heading: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: Under GDPR and UK GDPR, we process personal data only when we have a lawful basis. Here is the legal basis for each type of data we handle:
legalBasis.consentLi1: Newsletter signup — you actively provide your email and opt in to receive updates
legalBasis.consentLi2: Waitlist signup — you actively provide your email and language preference
legalBasis.consentLi3: Sentry session replay — replays are only captured after you give explicit consent via our cookie banner
legalBasis.legitimateLi1: Vercel Analytics — anonymous, cookie-free page view counting to improve our website. Our interest in understanding site usage is balanced against minimal privacy impact (no PII collected)
legalBasis.legitimateLi2: Sentry error monitoring — collecting error diagnostics to maintain service reliability. No user behaviour is captured without consent; only crash and error data is collected under this basis
legalBasis.legitimateLi3: Rate limiting (IP address processing) — preventing abuse of our API endpoints. IP addresses are processed transiently and not stored
legalBasis.contractLi1: iOS app learning data — processing your learning progress is necessary to deliver the language-learning service you use
legalBasis.contractLi2: iCloud sync — syncing your progress across devices is a core part of the service
legalBasis.contractLi3: Subscription management — verifying your tier to provide the appropriate features

dataFlow.heading: Where Your Data Goes
dataFlow.intro: Here is a plain-English summary of where your data is stored and processed:
dataFlow.li1: Your device — all iOS app learning data, preferences, and progress are stored locally on your iPhone or iPad using Apple’s SwiftData framework
dataFlow.li2: Your iCloud account — learning data syncs across your Apple devices via your personal iCloud account, encrypted by Apple. We have no access to this data
dataFlow.li3: Vercel (website hosting) — our website is hosted on Vercel’s global edge network. Anonymous analytics data is processed by Vercel. Vercel’s servers are primarily located in the United States with edge nodes worldwide
dataFlow.li4: Sentry (error monitoring) — error logs and (with your consent) session replay data are sent to Sentry’s servers in the United States. Sentry processes this data under their DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses
dataFlow.li5: Apple (App Store & iCloud) — subscription management and iCloud sync are handled by Apple’s global infrastructure
dataFlow.noOtherParties: Your data is not sent to any other third parties. We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook SDK, or any advertising networks.

howWeUse.heading: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: The limited data we handle is used solely to:
howWeUse.li1: Personalise your learning — spaced repetition scheduling, difficulty adaptation, and progress tracking depend on your learning history.
howWeUse.li2: Sync your progress — iCloud sync ensures your data follows you across all your Apple devices.
howWeUse.li3: Manage your subscription — we verify your membership tier to unlock the appropriate features.
howWeUse.li4: Improve the app and website — anonymous aggregate data helps us understand which features are valuable and where to focus development.
howWeUse.li5: Communicate with you — if you signed up for our newsletter or waitlist, we use your email to send product updates. You can unsubscribe at any time.
howWeUse.li6: Diagnose and fix bugs — Sentry error data (and session replays with your consent) help us identify and resolve issues quickly.

dataStorage.heading: Data Storage & Security
dataStorage.intro: LumenLingo uses a privacy-first, on-device architecture:
dataStorage.li1: On-device storage — all learning data is stored locally using Apple’s SwiftData framework, protected by your device’s built-in encryption.
dataStorage.li2: iCloud sync — data syncs between your devices via your personal iCloud account, encrypted end-to-end by Apple. We do not have access to your iCloud data.
dataStorage.li3: No external servers — LumenLingo does not maintain servers that store your personal data from the iOS app. There is no cloud database for us to secure (or breach).
dataStorage.li4: App Store security — subscription management is handled by Apple’s secure infrastructure.
dataStorage.li5: Website security — lumenlingo.com uses HTTPS encryption, strict Content Security Policy headers, and rate-limited API endpoints to protect your data.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: LumenLingo integrates with a limited number of third-party services:
thirdParty.li1: Apple App Store & iCloud — for app distribution, subscription management, payment processing, and data synchronisation. Subject to Apple’s Privacy Policy.
thirdParty.li2: Vercel — for website hosting, anonymous analytics, and performance monitoring. Cookie-free, GDPR-compliant. Subject to Vercel’s Privacy Policy.
thirdParty.li3: Sentry — for website error monitoring and (with consent) session replay. Subject to Sentry’s Privacy Policy.
thirdParty.noAdNetworks: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook SDK, or any advertising networks.

childrensPrivacy.heading: Children’s Privacy
childrensPrivacy.p1: LumenLingo is designed for users aged 13 and older. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 (or the applicable minimum age in your jurisdiction, which may be higher — for example, 16 in Germany and the Netherlands).
childrensPrivacy.p2: The iOS app does not require account registration and stores data locally, so no personal information is transmitted to us from app users of any age. On the website, we do not knowingly accept newsletter or waitlist signups from anyone under 13.
childrensPrivacy.p3: Parents and guardians can manage or delete the app and its data at any time through standard iOS device management. If you believe a child has provided personal data to us, please contact us at hello@lumenshore.com and we will delete it promptly.

dataRetention.heading: Data Retention & Deletion
dataRetention.intro: We only keep your data for as long as necessary:
dataRetention.websiteLi1: Newsletter/waitlist emails — retained until you unsubscribe, plus up to 30 days to process your removal.
dataRetention.websiteLi2: Sentry error logs — retained by Sentry for 90 days, then automatically deleted.
dataRetention.websiteLi3: Sentry session replays — retained by Sentry for 90 days, then automatically deleted.
dataRetention.websiteLi4: Vercel Analytics — retention per Vercel’s data retention policy (aggregated, no PII).
dataRetention.appLi1: Reset progress — use the in-app Settings → Reset Progress option to clear all learning data.
dataRetention.appLi2: Delete the app — uninstalling LumenLingo removes all locally stored data.
dataRetention.appLi3: iCloud data — you can manage iCloud storage through your device’s Settings → Apple ID → iCloud → Manage Storage.
dataRetention.appLi4: Subscription — cancel your subscription through Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions. No data is retained by us after cancellation.

yourRights.heading: Your Rights
yourRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have additional rights regarding your data:
yourRights.gdprLi1: Right to access your data — app data is on your device and iCloud; for website data, contact us.
yourRights.gdprLi2: Right to rectification — edit app preferences directly; for website data, contact us.
yourRights.gdprLi3: Right to erasure — reset app progress, delete the app, or contact us to remove your email from our lists.
yourRights.gdprLi4: Right to data portability — your app data is stored in standard formats in iCloud. Contact us for website data export.
yourRights.gdprLi5: Right to object — contact us to opt out of anonymous analytics or to object to processing based on legitimate interest.
yourRights.gdprLi6: Right to restrict processing — contact us to request that we limit how we process your data.
yourRights.gdprLi7: Right to lodge a complaint — you can complain to the ICO (Information Commissioner’s Office) at ico.org.uk or your local supervisory authority.
yourRights.ccpaLi1: Right to know what data is collected — detailed above.
yourRights.ccpaLi2: Right to delete — reset app progress, delete the app, or contact us to remove website data.
yourRights.ccpaLi3: Right to opt out — we do not sell or share personal information for cross-context behavioural advertising.
yourRights.ccpaLi4: Non-discrimination — you will not be treated differently for exercising your rights.
yourRights.exerciseRights: To exercise any of these rights, email us at hello@lumenshore.com. We will respond within 30 days (or sooner where required by law). We may need to verify your identity before processing certain requests.

policyUpdates.heading: Policy Updates
policyUpdates.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time, typically to reflect changes in our services or legal requirements. When we make significant changes, we’ll update the “Last updated” date and version number at the top of this page.
policyUpdates.p2: We encourage you to review this page periodically. Continued use of LumenLingo after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
policyUpdates.v2: v2.0 (23 March 2026) — Extended policy to cover lumenlingo.com website data collection, added Sentry session replay disclosure, Vercel Analytics disclosure, legal basis for processing, data flow section, and service worker caching details.
policyUpdates.v1: v1.0 (22 March 2026) — Initial privacy policy covering the LumenLingo iOS app.

contactUs.heading: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, your data, or want to exercise your rights, please reach out:
contactUs.company: Company: LumenShore Ltd, Windsor House, Troon Way Business Centre, Humberstone Lane, Leicester, England, LE4 9HA
contactUs.responseTime: We typically respond within 48 hours and within 30 days for formal data rights requests.

subProcessors.heading: Sub-Processors
subProcessors.intro: The following third-party services process data on our behalf. Each sub-processor has been assessed for data protection compliance:

apple.purpose: App distribution, subscription billing, data sync

vercel.purpose: Website hosting, anonymous analytics, speed insights

sentry.dataProcessed: Error logs, stack traces, session replays (with consent)

dpaStatus.heading: Data Processing Agreements
dpaStatus.p1: We maintain Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) or equivalent contractual protections with all sub-processors that handle personal data:
dpaStatus.li1: Apple — covered by Apple's standard DPA for developers, incorporating Standard Contractual Clauses for international transfers.
dpaStatus.li2: Vercel — covered by Vercel's DPA, available at vercel.com/legal/dpa. Vercel Analytics is cookie-free and processes no personal data.
dpaStatus.li3: Sentry — covered by Sentry's DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) for EU-US data transfers.

changes.heading: Sub-Processor Changes
changes.p1: If we add or change a sub-processor that handles personal data, we will update this page and note the change in the Version History section of this Privacy Policy. For material changes, we will provide at least 30 days' notice before the new sub-processor begins processing data.

internationalTransfers.heading: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.intro: LumenShore Ltd is based in the United Kingdom. Some of your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the UK and the European Economic Area (EEA). Here is where each service processes data and the legal mechanism that protects the transfer:
internationalTransfers.li1: Apple (United States & global) — iCloud data and App Store subscription data may be processed in Apple’s global data centres, including in the United States. Apple participates in transfers under Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
internationalTransfers.li2: Vercel (United States & global edge) — our website is served from Vercel’s edge network, with primary servers in the United States. Vercel Analytics processes no personal data. Website hosting data is protected under Vercel’s GDPR DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses.
internationalTransfers.li3: Sentry (United States) — error logs and session replay data (with your consent) are transmitted to Sentry’s servers in the United States. These transfers are protected by Sentry’s DPA incorporating Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).

safeguards.heading: Transfer Safeguards
safeguards.intro: For all international data transfers, we ensure at least one of the following safeguards is in place:
safeguards.li1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) — EU Commission-approved contractual clauses that bind the data importer to protect your data to GDPR standards.
safeguards.li2: EU-US Data Privacy Framework — where the recipient is certified under the framework, providing an adequacy basis for transfers to the US.
safeguards.li3: UK International Data Transfer Agreement (IDTA) — the UK equivalent of SCCs, approved by the ICO for transfers from the UK.
safeguards.li4: Adequacy decisions — where the European Commission or UK Government has determined that the destination country provides adequate data protection.

internationalTransfers.p1: You may request a copy of the relevant transfer safeguards by contacting us at hello@lumenshore.com.

aggregateData.heading: Aggregated and De-identified Data
aggregateData.p1: We may collect, aggregate, and de-identify personal data so that it can no longer reasonably identify any individual. Once de-identified, such data is no longer personal data under GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, or any applicable data protection law.
aggregateData.p2: We may use, disclose, and publish de-identified and aggregated data for any purpose, including but not limited to:

deIdentification.heading: De-identification Standards
deIdentification.p1: Our de-identification process meets the following legal standards:
deIdentification.li1: GDPR Recital 26 — data cannot be singled out, linked, or inferred to identify any individual, taking into account all means reasonably likely to be used.
deIdentification.li2: CCPA § 1798.140(m) — information that cannot reasonably be used to infer information about, or otherwise be linked to, a particular consumer or household. We maintain a commitment not to attempt to re-identify de-identified data.

examples.heading: Examples of Aggregate Data
examples.p1: Examples of the types of aggregate data we may derive and publish include:
examples.li1: Total number of users per language pair
examples.li5: Feature usage statistics across membership tiers
examples.p2: No individual user can be identified from any published aggregate data.

aggregateData.survival: Our right to retain and use Aggregate Data survives account deletion and service termination. After you delete your account, we may retain Aggregate Data that was derived from your use of the Service.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Terms of Service for LumenLingo. Understand your rights and responsibilities when using our language-learning app — written in plain English.

hero.heading: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: The rules of the road for using LumenLingo — written simply, because legal documents shouldn't need a dictionary.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to LumenLingo. These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your use of the LumenLingo mobile application (“the App”) operated by LumenShore Ltd (“LumenShore”, “we”, “us”, or “our”).
introduction.p2: By downloading, installing, or using LumenLingo, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you don't agree with any part of these Terms, please don't use the App.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.intro: By accessing or using LumenLingo, you confirm that:
acceptance.li1: You are at least 13 years old (or the minimum age required in your jurisdiction).
acceptance.li2: If you are under 18, you have obtained consent from a parent or legal guardian.
acceptance.li3: You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement.
acceptance.li4: You will comply with these Terms and all applicable laws.

yourAccount.heading: Your Account
yourAccount.intro: LumenLingo does not require traditional account registration. Your identity within the App is tied to your Apple ID and device. You are responsible for:
yourAccount.li1: Maintaining the security of your Apple ID and device access.
yourAccount.li2: All activity that occurs through your use of the App.
yourAccount.li3: Keeping your device's operating system updated for the best experience and security.

subscriptions.heading: Subscriptions & Billing
subscriptions.intro: LumenLingo offers free and premium membership tiers. Premium features require a paid subscription.
subscriptions.li1: Billing — all subscriptions are processed and managed by Apple through the App Store. We do not handle payments directly.
subscriptions.li2: Free tier — provides access to core learning features with limited language pairs and practice modes.
subscriptions.li3: Premium tiers — unlock additional language pairs, unlimited practice, soundscapes, breathing orbs, and other premium features as described in the App.
subscriptions.li4: Auto-renewal — subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period.
subscriptions.li5: Cancellation — you can cancel your subscription at any time through your Apple ID Settings → Subscriptions. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.
subscriptions.li6: Refunds — refund requests are handled by Apple in accordance with their refund policies. Contact Apple Support for refund enquiries.
subscriptions.li7: Price changes — we may adjust subscription prices. You will be notified in advance, and changes apply only to your next renewal period.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree to use LumenLingo only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must not:
acceptableUse.li1: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the App.
acceptableUse.li2: Attempt to access, tamper with, or use non-public areas of the App or its systems.
acceptableUse.li3: Copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works based on the App.
acceptableUse.li4: Use the App in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair its functionality.
acceptableUse.li5: Use automated scripts, bots, or other tools to interact with the App.
acceptableUse.li6: Attempt to circumvent subscription or tier restrictions.

intellectualProperty.heading: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.p1: All content within LumenLingo — including but not limited to flashcard content, translations, audio, soundscapes, visual designs, shader effects, animations, the LumenLingo name, and the LumenShore brand — is the intellectual property of LumenShore Ltd and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
intellectualProperty.p2: Your subscription grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to use the App for personal, non-commercial language-learning purposes. This licence does not include the right to:
intellectualProperty.li1: Reproduce, distribute, or publicly display any App content.
intellectualProperty.li2: Use any content for commercial purposes or in competing products.
intellectualProperty.li3: Remove or alter any proprietary notices or labels.

userContent.heading: User Content & Data
userContent.p1: Your learning data (progress, preferences, practice history) is stored on your device and in your personal iCloud account. LumenShore does not claim ownership of your personal learning data.
userContent.p2: For more details on how we handle data, please review our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

disclaimers.heading: Disclaimers
disclaimers.intro: LumenLingo is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. While we strive for accuracy and quality, we make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding:
disclaimers.li1: The accuracy or completeness of any language content or translations.
disclaimers.li2: Uninterrupted or error-free operation of the App.
disclaimers.li3: The results you may achieve from using the App.
disclaimers.li4: The availability of specific features at any given time.
disclaimers.supplement: LumenLingo is a supplementary learning tool. It is not a substitute for professional language instruction, certified translation services, or academic coursework.

limitationOfLiability.heading: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.intro: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, LumenShore Ltd shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, data, or goodwill arising from:
limitationOfLiability.li1: Your use of (or inability to use) the App.
limitationOfLiability.li2: Any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in the content.
limitationOfLiability.li3: Unauthorised access to your device or data (not caused by our negligence).
limitationOfLiability.li4: Any interruption or cessation of the service.
limitationOfLiability.cap: Our total liability for any claim arising from these Terms or your use of LumenLingo shall not exceed the amount you paid for the App in the 12 months preceding the claim.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.p1: You may stop using LumenLingo at any time by deleting the App. Your subscription, if active, should be cancelled separately through Apple's subscription management.
termination.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the App if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms. In the event of termination:
termination.li1: Your licence to use the App is immediately revoked.
termination.li2: Your local data remains on your device until you choose to delete it.
termination.li3: Active subscriptions should be cancelled through Apple.
termination.li4: Provisions that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

governingLaw.heading: Governing Law
governingLaw.p1: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, without regard to conflict of law principles.
governingLaw.p2: Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales. However, this does not affect your statutory rights as a consumer in your country of residence.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make significant changes, we'll update the “Last updated” date at the top and may notify you through the App.
changes.p2: Continued use of LumenLingo after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you disagree with the changes, please stop using the App and cancel any active subscription.

contactUs.heading: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have questions about these Terms or need to report a concern, please contact us:

aggregateData.heading: Aggregate Data
aggregateData.p1: By using the Service, you acknowledge that LumenShore may derive aggregated, anonymised, and statistical data from your use of the Service (“Aggregate Data”).
aggregateData.p2: Aggregate Data does not identify you personally and may be used by LumenShore for any lawful business purpose without restriction, compensation, or attribution.
aggregateData.p3: Examples of Aggregate Data include: total number of users per language pair, average learning session duration, most commonly studied vocabulary, error rates per difficulty level, and feature usage statistics.
aggregateData.p4: LumenShore may use Aggregate Data for product improvement, research, analytics, marketing, benchmarking, investor reporting, blog posts, case studies, and public reports.
aggregateData.survival: LumenShore’s right to retain and use Aggregate Data survives account deletion and service termination. After you delete your account, we may retain Aggregate Data derived from your use of the Service.

meta.description: Dicas, guias e insights para aprendizes de idiomas. Explore a ciência da aprendizagem, conselhos práticos e as novidades da equipe LumenLingo.
meta.ogDescription: Dicas, guias e insights para aprendizes de idiomas do LumenLingo.

meta.title: Idiomas suportados — 9 idiomas, 25+ pares
meta.description: Explore todos os pares de idiomas do LumenLingo. Aprenda espanhol, francês, alemão, japonês, chinês, árabe, italiano, polonês e mais com cartões bonitos.
meta.ogDescription: 9 idiomas, 25+ pares bidirecionais. Aprenda em qualquer direção com vocabulário curado e prática adaptativa.
